title: Be gay, do crime!
description: The resourcepack adds "Be gay, do crime!" to the splash text pool.
body:
![Splash text saying "Be gay, do crime!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bc4708098cd6883bbdc376095835a43cd1b17f8.png)

The resourcepack adds "Be gay, do crime!" to the splash text pool.
